description: Shaping with mismatched steps lengths → SHAPING_STEPS_LENGTH_MISMATCH
input:
shaping Train:
  steps x = [1, 2, 3]
  steps y = [10, 20]
  sessions = 5
  FI {x}s

description: Shaping with empty steps list → SHAPING_EMPTY_STEPS
input:
shaping Train:
  steps v = []
  sessions = 5
  FI {v}s

description: Shaping placeholder references undeclared variable → SHAPING_UNDEFINED_VARIABLE
input:
shaping Train:
  steps v = [2, 4, 8]
  sessions = 5
  FI {w}s

description: Two session specs in one phase → DUPLICATE_SESSION_SPEC
Two stability specs in one phase → DUPLICATE_STABILITY_SPEC
input:
phase Test:
  sessions >= 10
  stable(visual)
  stable(cv, threshold=5%)
  VI60s

description: Shaping-generated name collides with user-defined phase → DUPLICATE_PHASE_NAME
input:
phase Train_1:
  sessions = 5
  FR5

shaping Train:
  steps v = [10, 20]
  sessions = 5
  FR {v}
